notes: CSRC materials identify shareholder reduction regulation as a formal listed-company rule area. Used to support share-supply and regulatory-chain checks; stock-specific conclusions still require current company and exchange evidence. https://www.csrc.gov.cn/csrc/c100028/c7483136/content.shtml
